title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: YouTube tutorial demonstrating Gemini 3.5 Flash capabilities across eight workflows including multimodal vision, video analysis with inline Python, contract analysis with extended thinking, code generation from sketches, voice-to-task conversion, error diagnosis, OCR for JSON extraction, and Workspace agentic automation. The creator argues Flash has displaced the Pro tier on performance-to-cost grounds.
